title: One good turn deserves another
question: 把今天课文里“借入、借出、还回去、替某个东西付款”的方向放进同学借文具、朋友垫小钱和公平付款场景——这一题不打分、老师只会鼓励 + 给一句小建议。把下面 3 个场景的空都填上、用 word bank 里的短语。
example_answer: I forgot my pen, so I asked Jack if I could borrow one from him. If I borrow something, I should pay it back or return it.

options.label: A
options.scenario_zh: 借入方向：我忘带笔，所以问 Jack 能不能从他那里借一支
options.english_template: I forgot my pen, so I asked Jack if I could ___.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 借出和还钱：朋友让我先借给她二十元，并说明天还我
options.english_template: My friend asked me to ___, and she promised to pay me back tomorrow.

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 公平付款：Sam 用“礼尚往来”当理由，让别人替他买饮料
options.english_template: Sam did one good turn for me and said one good turn deserves another. Then he asked me to ___.
